text: Welcome to TickyTack — where every minute counts. Literally.
Signing up takes 30 seconds. We timed it. Obviously.
Show me the money! Well, the hours. Same thing when you bill.
Drag, drop, done. Your billable hours just entered themselves.
Daily? Weekly? Monthly? We don't judge your time perspective.
Projects, color-coded. Because spreadsheets are so 2005.
New project, new key, new money. Three clicks.
Tickets: where tasks go to get tracked, not forgotten.
Your team. All accounted for. No one's hiding.
Invite your teammates. Misery loves company. So does billing.
Export to Excel with real formulas. Your accountant will weep with joy.
Import it back! Round-trip Excel. What goes out, comes back in.
JIRA who? Connect your instance, import projects and tickets. Easy peasy.
Free to start, Pro when you're serious. Your wallet decides.
Dark mode. Because developers track time too.
TickyTack. Track time. Ship projects. Get paid.
